def negative_broad_except_used_to_mask_type_or_shape_bug():
    rule_id = "broad_except_used_to_mask_type_or_shape_bug"
    family = "quality"
    severity = "contextual"
    status = "stable"
    intent = "shows the preferred shape that should not trigger this rule"
    description = "Flag broad exception handling that conceals structural bugs in the input or code."
    return rule_id, family, severity, status, intent, description
